message:
🐛 Increase HPA stabilization window to 240s to fix flaky e2e test (#661)

The "should maintain scaled state while load is active" test was
flaky because the HPA stabilization window was shorter than the
time it takes for the deployment to scale up.

Timeline of the issue:
- HPA recommends 2 replicas (T=0)
- With 30s window, scale-down allowed after T=30
- Deployment reaches 2 replicas at T=210 (~3.5 minutes)
- By this time, the stabilization window has passed
- HPA scales back down to 1 immediately

Increasing the stabilization window to 240s (4 minutes) ensures
the window covers the scale-up period plus buffer time for the
30s test stability check. This matches the chart's default value.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
